data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, environmental storytelling, professional book-summary video visual, warm natural light, quiet emotional realism, realistic lived-in details, 35mm lens, 16:9, no readable text. Scene 03/8, Breakfast tension. Primary instruction: wide kitchen morning shot; table with two untouched rice bowls, miso soup, school bag on a chair, unopened letter beside a cup; the woman stands by the sink in the background, small in frame, domestic pressure implied by objects. Visible character rule: one East Asian woman, early 30s, short black bob haircut, cream cardigan, white top, dark skirt; exactly one visible person, never a close-up portrait, never looking directly at camera. Emotional theme: family roles and silence create pressure. Blank paper only, no readable words.
